query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS course_completions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  purchaseId INT NOT NULL,
  customerEmail VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  userId INT,
  courseId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  courseName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  certificateIssued BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  certificateUrl VARCHAR(500),
  upsellOffered BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  upsellAccepted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  upsellProductId VARCHAR(100)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  purchaseId INT NOT NULL,
  customerEmail VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  userId INT,
  courseId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  courseName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  certificateIssued BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  certificateUrl VARCHAR(500),
  upsellOffered BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  upsellAccepted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  upsellProductId VARCHAR(100)
